g.text: Entity ID Bit Packing (32-bit u32 handle)

ul.li: Index: 20 bits allows for 1.04M simultaneous entities.
Generation: 12 bits prevents "ABA" pointer problems during recycling.
Alignment: u32 (4-byte) aligned for atomic CAS operations.
Position and Velocity are stored in separate contiguous arrays.
Simd-friendly: Velocity can be added to Position using packed loads.
Cache Line Utilization: 64B line typically holds 8 Positions or 8 Velocities.

ol.li: Update EntityLocation for the moved last_entity.

ul.li: Add<C> follows cached ToID if present.
Avoids expensive signature hashing on every frame.
